name: AuctionBidProcessor
purpose: Synchronous real-time bid processing with Redis SETNX for atomicity. SETNX bid lock + DECRBY budget atomicity; stateless auction design (no Elasticsearch state machine)
ironRules: IR-1: SETNX(auction-bid-lock:{auctionId}) at ORDER 1. Lock held → unconditional return of previousBid (idempotent).
IR-2: DECRBY(advertiser-budget:{advertiserId}, bidAmountCents) at ORDER 2. Atomic Redis operation — no Elasticsearch OCC.
IR-3: newBudget < 0 → INCRBY to restore, emit BidRejected with BUDGET_INSUFFICIENT.
IR-4: No auction state machine in Elasticsearch — stateless design. Event log only.
IR-5: tenantId from ALS only — never from event payload.
machineComponents: Redis SETNX auction-bid-lock at ORDER 1 — idempotent duplicate prevention
DECRBY advertiser-budget at ORDER 2 — atomic ledger operation
INCRBY to restore budget on BUDGET_INSUFFICIENT rejection
Stateless auction: no Elasticsearch state machine, event log only
freedomComponents: auction_bid_lock_ttl_ms — duration of the SETNX auction bid lock in milliseconds
auction_response_timeout_ms — max time to wait for bid response
